title: iPvP
description: All in one PvP resource pack, use for maximum aura
body:
This resourcepack was made with PvP specifically shield gamemodes in mind and adds everything you would need to become a combat master
such as:
1. cobweb overlay
2. low fire
3. small utils
4. small totem pop
5. side shield
6. sharp axes
7. small particles
8. clear water
9. clear gui
10. darker widgets
and +10000000 aura
